## Problem Statement

## Constitutional Compatibility

<!-- Every feature in Algorapolis must be assessed against the constitutional framework. Address the following: -->

**Does this feature conflict with any of the Four Guardrails?**

- Guardrail 1 (No algorithm may override human democratic will):
- Guardrail 2 (All systems must preserve offline functionality):
- Guardrail 3 (No personal data may be used without explicit sovereign consent):
- Guardrail 4 (Emotional data may inform but never dictate governance decisions):

**Does this feature encroach upon any of the Six Human-Reserved Domains?**

- Moral judgment:
- Cultural identity:
- Spiritual belief:
- Artistic expression:
- Family structure:
- Personal purpose:

<!-- If any answer is "yes," explain the nature of the conflict and any proposed mitigations. Features that violate guardrails or encroach on human-reserved domains will require a constitutional amendment proposal alongside this request. -->
